note: Created INativeMethodsProxy interface (src/WgSocket/INativeMethodsProxy.cs), NativeMethodsProxy production implementation (src/WgSocket/NativeMethodsProxy.cs), MockNativeMethodsProxy test fake (tests/WgSocket.Tests/MockNativeMethodsProxy.cs), and 23 passing tests (tests/WgSocket.Tests/NativeMethodsProxyTests.cs). All methods mirror NativeMethods P/Invoke declarations with configurable return codes, output buffer population, and call tracking.
